mapper.select: SELECT * FROM msg_record WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE msg_record SET template_id = #{templateId}, message_type = #{messageType}, receiver_id = #{receiverId}, receiver_address = #{receiverAddress}, subject = #{subject}, content = #{content}, send_status = #{sendStatus}, send_time = #{sendTime}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = #{version} + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT id, template_id, message_type, receiver_id, receiver_address, subject, content, send_status, send_time, error_message, created_time FROM msg_record WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
